Tests for weather app layouts and build script for compiling and testing in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[test_weather_app_layout.c](test_weather_app_layout.c.md)**: Tests for rendering various weather app layouts, including different weather conditions and location scenarios.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing the weather app layout in the Pebble firmware.
